product.description: Champs Baby Bottle Cleanser tackles stubborn residues and keeps bottles, nipples, toys, and baby accessories sparkling clean. This safe and effective formula can even be used on fruits and vegetables.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Cocobetainamido Amphopropionate, (Plant-Based Surfactant), Lauryl Glucoside, (Plant-Based Surfactant), Sodium Benzoate, Disodium Cocoamphodiacetate, (Plant-Based Surfactant), Citric Acid, Polyaminopropyl Biguanide, Tetrasodium, Edta, Ethanol, Sodium Chloride, Cetylpyridinium Chloride.
metaData.Key Information:
• Versatile Cleaning Solution: Effectively removes stubborn residues, milk stains, and odors from bottles, nipples, pacifiers, toys, and infant accessories.
• Antibacterial Power: Eliminates 99.9% of bacteria, ensuring a high standard of cleanliness for your baby’s items.
• Gentle & Skin-Friendly: Safe for sensitive skin while maintaining powerful cleaning performance.
• Multi-Purpose Use: Suitable for cleaning not only baby essentials but also fruits and vegetables.
• Toxic-free and cruelty-free
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

product.name: Champs Baby Bottle Cleanser

metaData.Ingredients: Purified Water (Aqua), Sodium Citrate, Alcohol, Propylene Glycol, Sucrose Laurate, Potassium Carbonate, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Perfume
metaData.Key Information:
• Kills 99.9% of bacteria
• Made from 100% food grade (edible) ingredients
• Removes even the toughest formula stains and yet gentle on skin
• Safely cleans baby accessories, toys, fruit and vegetables
metaData.Preparation:
1. Clean feeding bottles, nipples / teats, etc by pouring the cleanser directly onto the washing storage
2. After washing, rinse the feeding bottles, nipples/teats, toys and accessories with running water for about 5 seconds
• For fruits and vegetables: Rinse with water for at least 30 seconds
• For rinsing in a basin: Water must be changed at least twice
metaData.Storage Information: Keep out of reach of children

metaData.SAP Product Name: KODOMO BABY LAUNDRY DETERGENT NATURE CARE REFILL - BLUE 1L

product.name: Kodomo Baby Laundry Detergent Refill - Nature Care

metaData.Key Information: Pigeon Sterilizing Tablets have been specially formulated to effectively sterilise baby's nursing, breast feeding accessories and other products where baby's hygiene is of paramount concern to parents.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Rinse with clean running tap water
2. Fully dissolve tablet to 2.3L or 4 pints of cold or lukewarm water in a non-metallic container
3. Soaked items that are to be sterilised completely in the solution, leaving no air bubbles trapped inside any of the items
4. Keep all items soaked in the solution for at least 30 minutes before using or until the next feed
5. Remove items from the solution with clean hands or sterilisation tongs
• Note:
1. No rinsing is required
2. Fill bottles immediately with new feed
3. The solution can be re-used withing 24 hours
4. Wash bottles, teats, caps and other products (breast feeding items, pacifiers and teethers) thoroughly after each feed
metaData.Storage Information: Keep out of reach of children

product.name: Kodomo Baby Laundry Detergent - Extra Care

metaData.Key Information: Softness of babies' fabrics was enhanced by the unique soft and dry formula to help it absorb sweat and dampness.

product.description:
• Gentle on sensitive skin, yet powerful on dirt and grime
• Plant-based formulation
• Eco-conscious packaging

metaData.Ingredients:
Water, Coco-Glucoside, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Peel Oil,
Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate,
Potassium Sorbate, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Flower Extract, Sodium Chloride.
metaData.Key Information:
Why You'll Love It!

• This cleaning detergent has been thoughtfully crafted with the goodness of Organic Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice and Organic Lavandula Stoechas Extract. Immerse yourself in a fully natural cleaning experience as this formula remains free from parabens, SLS, dyes, phosphates, NPE, formaldehyde, phthalates, chlorine, alcohol, and artificial fragrance.
• Revel in the naturally uplifting aroma of citrus and grapefruit oils, leaving your items with a fresh and light scent. Our extra-concentrated solution guarantees effective grime and dirt removal, effortlessly tackling milk residues, food grease, and messy spills.
• Rest easy knowing it's not only safe on sensitive baby skin but also cruelty-free, as we stand firm against animal testing.
metaData.Preparation:
How to Use:
Use a clean, damp sponge or pour directly onto dishes or bottles. Wash and rinse as normal.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place. Away from direct sunlight and high humidity.

product.description: This product is for overnight use. It has a soft & stretchable 360˚ waistband which provides comfortable fit for baby on the move. It has a superb absorbency core which allows fast absorption and quick drying surface. It has a double leak guard to fit baby's leg comfortably and provides protection against side leakage. It has a colour-changing wetness indicator which changes colour when  wet. It also has a soft & breathable outer cover which allows good air-flow through.

metaData.Key Information:
• Soft & stretchable 360˚ waistband which provides comfortable fit for baby on the move
• Superb absorbency core which allows fast absorption and quick drying surface
• Double leak guard to fit baby's leg comfortably and provides protection against side leakage
• A colour-changing wetness indicator which changes colour when wet
• Soft & breathable outer cover which allows good air-flow through
metaData.Preparation:
• How to wear
1. Pull up like pants with disposal tape behind
2. Ensure leg guards are fitted and not folded to prevent leakage
• How to remove & dispose 1. Tear off seams on both sides to remove
2. Roll up soiled diaper pants and secure it with disposal tape
metaData.SAP Product Name: FAIRPRICE BABY DRY PANTS SIZE L 56S
